prompt: High-end Chinese fashion magazine portrait photography, inspired by 'Esquire Korea' and 'Arena Homme+' styles. Featuring thick eyebrows, a high nose bridge, a clear jawline, and steady, confident eyes. Light gray gradient background, soft cinematic lighting with backlighting to define the silhouette, and realistic skin textures. Shot with a full-frame camera and an 85mm f/1.4 lens, 9:16 vertical composition, 8K ultra-HD. 20-year-old Chinese male, thick eyebrows, calm brow peak, deep eyes reflecting confidence, powerful gaze. High, straight nose bridge, three-dimensional nasal root. Sharp jawline and rugged facial structure. Short dark brown hair with a side part, natural shine. Real skin with fine textures and natural skin tone. Clothing: Black double-breasted suit (wool blend, matte fabric, peak lapel, slim fit), paired with a light blue poplin shirt and a navy tie with gold geometric patterns. Dark brown oxfords. Simple metal wristwatch. Half-body portrait, 3:4 aspect ratio. Universal negative prompts: cartoon, anime, 3D render, plastic texture, wax-like feel, excessive skin smoothing, no pores, AI fake face, stiff expression, fake smile, high saturation colors, deformed limbs, studio style, messy background, overexposed, over-sharpened. Scene: Light brown background (#D0D0D0 to #F0F0F0) with a natural floor transition.
